summary: The HireFlow pipeline currently contains 3 active candidates spread across the screening and interview stages, with 2 candidates in screening and 1 in interview. There are no candidates currently in the new, offer, or rejected stages. All candidates have been updated within the past 1-2 days, which indicates strong recruiter engagement and a healthy pipeline velocity, with no one stuck in any stage for 3 or more days. Priority should be on advancing the screening candidates toward interviews to keep momentum through the funnel.
